utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items, each fully specified with the required details—e.g., the property has address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, price, and key features. Financing includes down payment, mortgage amount, term, interest rate, and monthly payment. Legal_services lists provider, services, and cost. Moving_services lists provider, services, and cost. Setup_services lists utilities and smart_home_setup with costs. Total_budget provides a cost breakdown. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution is a purchase property located at 127 Perth Avenue, Toronto, priced at CAD 815,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the one closest in price and characteristics (3 bedrooms, home office, workshop, garden, 2-car parking, high-speed internet) is the 'Historic Townhouse' priced at CAD 750K with a rating of 6. The financing section includes a traditional mortgage with 20% down and a 5.19% APR, which aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 9) in the ground truth. The legal services are residential conveyancing with title search etc., matching the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving services are local and detailed but expensive (CAD 2,800), most similar to 'Corporate Relocation' (rating 2) in the moving options due to cost and comprehensive service. The setup services include smart thermostat, lighting, and high-speed internet, which corresponds to the 'Smart Home Package' (rating 10).
